subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received and studied. Verily, that people hath been guilty of such oppression as hath cast gloom over the dominions of earth and heaven
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب شما رسید و تمام ملاحظه شد قد اتی القوم بظلم تکدر به الملک و الملکوت و ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @exhortations and counsels, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort
